channel.title: root on False Protagonist
channel.description: Recent content in root on False Protagonist

item.title: Deprecated Centos 6
item.description: Base Centos 6 isn’t able to get its full updates since May 10th, 2017 and there are no even Maintainance updates since November 30th, 2020. For most of us that version of Centos, released July 20th, 2011 is objectively outdated but still, a huge amount of servers are using it and there are no plans or opportunities to migrate it further. Now, Centos 6 repository looks like a singular file with a message:

item.title: Store Files in a CouchDB
item.description: There is a very convinent way to store a files indise CouchDB and by able to get them directly from it. In a simple way, an attachment is a new field in a document. Lets say we have a document with id e5f46d968b31e400b5db6426d000024b. $ curl -X GET http://admin:password@127.0.0.1:5984/sandbox/e5f46d968b31e400b5db6426d000024b {"_id":"e5f46d968b31e400b5db6426d000024b","_rev":"1-967a00dff5e02add41819138abb3284d"} and we want to attach some index.html to that document. We have a two way to attach a file: Attach via Fauxton There is a Upload attachment button on a documents page

item.title: Czech Words Frequency List
item.description: I make a decision to learn Czech language and to procrastinate I’ve made up a problem for myself: I need a deck for the Anki with the most frequently accrued words in that language. So my mind considered that problem as a blocker to my further Czech lessons and force me to spend time on it. First of all, I need a data and very convenient way to get a lot of Czech text was a movie subtitle.

item.title: How to Get Basic Information About a Process in Linux
item.description: There is a way to get information about any process (with according permissions) using filesystem operations only. You need no additional tools besides you already have on your system. In most cases cat will be ehough. Actually for this post we will familrise with such files that can be displayed with cat and we will begin with the real simle ones /proc/<pid>/cmdline It will produce an output with full command line with the process was runned.

item.title: Start of the 100 Days to Offload
item.description: So, this will be my attempt to start and proceed with #100DaysToOffload. I’m not sure that I will have enough ideas or material to make really useful content and it could happen that there will appear posts like that: just random thoughts with no much sense. My initial plan is to publish one post in 3 days and I think it is enough to come up with some idea and write not completely garbage text.

item.title: Close all but the last windows in gvim
item.description: Sometimes I want to close all windows and start from the scratch. Shortcut :qa do this but too much literally: it closes vim too. So to avoid this I wrote this snippet. You need just to add it to your vimrc file. Have a comment on one of my posts? Start a discussion in my public inbox by sending an email to ~histrio/public-inbox@lists.sr.ht [mailing list etiquette]

item.title: List all tcp connections in windows
item.description: Have a comment on one of my posts? Start a discussion in my public inbox by sending an email to ~histrio/public-inbox@lists.sr.ht [mailing list etiquette]

item.title: Currency formatting snippet
item.description: Have a comment on one of my posts? Start a discussion in my public inbox by sending an email to ~histrio/public-inbox@lists.sr.ht [mailing list etiquette]

item.title: Save as root in vim
item.description: TLDR :w !sudo tee % It is a very common situation when for some remote session you are running vim with your default user to make some quick changes for some of your config files. After spending some time on it you are trying to save the result and getting this: E45: 'readonly' option is set (add ! to override) or "/etc/zsh/zshenv" E212: Can't open file for writing

item.title: Audiobooks as Podcast
item.description: Here some audiobooks coverted into podcast via rssbook. Ru Non-fiction Ася Казанцева, Кто бы мог подумать! Ася Казанцева, В интернете кто-то не прав! Ася Казанцева, Мозг материален Миф. Греческие мифы в пересказе Александр Панчин, Сумма биотехнологии Латынина Юлия, Иисус. Историческое расследование Карен Армстронг, История Бога; 4000 лет исканий в иудаизме, христианстве и исламе Паскаль Буайе, Объясняя религию. Природа религиозного мышления Ru Fiction Поправка 22 Москва-Петушки En Non-fiction Antifragile En Fiction Blindsight Harry Potter and the Philosopher’s Stone Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows
